mapper.update: UPDATE test_paper SET total_score = #{realTotal} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT q.id,q.type,q.content,q.option_a,q.option_b,q.option_c,q.option_d,q.correct_answer,q.analysis,pq.score AS paper_score,pq.sort FROM test_paper tp JOIN paper_question pq ON tp.id = pq.paper_id JOIN question q ON pq.question_id = q.id WHERE tp.id = #{id} ORDER BY pq.sort ASC, q.id ASC
